title: Amcor sells Russian operations to HT Investments
text: Packaging company Amcor Plc AMCR, -0.99%   AMC, -0.28% said Friday it completed the sale of its three factories in Russia to Russia-based investor HS Investments for 370 million euros ($392.7 million) in cash. Amcor's three sites in Russia employed 900 people and accounted for about 2% of sales in 2022.

title: Amcor (AMCR), Licella Team Up to Create Recycling Facility
text: Amcor (AMCR) enters into a partnership with Licella Holdings to create Australia???s one of the first advanced recycling facilities.

title: Amcor: Strong Supplier Of Packaging For Leading Brands
text: Amcor is an Australian-based company that supplies packaging materials for various industries to major brands such as Unilever, Nestle, Mondelez, PepsiCo, Novartis, and Coca-Cola. Net sales increased 3% in the first quarter of fiscal 2023. Earnings per share increased 10% and EBIT rose sharply by 9% at constant currency.

title: Amcor: Shares Reasonably Valued And Nearing Technical Support; Solid Yield
text: The Switzerland stock market has endured a tough 2022, but one Materials name is higher on the year. I see a decent valuation given good free cash flow and a high yield.
